description_long: This house features a modern, angular design with a prominent hip roof in a muted beige color. The front facade includes a covered porch with a slatted awning, wooden accents, and large windows, providing a welcoming entryway. The structure is two stories tall, with a spacious balcony and deck areas on both the front and rear sides, enclosed by wooden railings. The exterior walls are primarily white, complemented by natural wood trim and glass elements, giving the house a clean and contemporary appearance. A chimney rises from one side of the roof, indicating the presence of a fireplace inside. The house is surrounded by partial boundary walls, suggesting a private urban lot.
description: A modern two-story house with a beige hip roof, white walls, wooden accents, large windows, and spacious balconies and decks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a slatted awning, large windows, wooden trim, and a covered porch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid white wall, the hip roof's slope, and a balcony with wooden railings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large deck, glass doors, and a mix of window sizes, with partial boundary walls enclosing the space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing another solid wall, the continuation of the hip roof, and the edge of the front awning and rear deck.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and small windows, including glass doors and balcony windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with a slatted awning, wooden trim, and large glass windows, providing a modern and inviting appearance.
